## PixLab Desktop 0.1.4

This release focuses on the desktop pet workflow, the pet library, and easier app updates.

### New

- Added a Pet Library tab for saved and imported pets.
- Added pet package import and export support.
- Added bundled sample pets that can be shipped with the app.
- Added in-app update checking from GitHub Releases.
- Added Windows 64-bit and Windows 32-bit release installers.
- Added separate README files for English, Vietnamese, and Chinese.

### Improved

- Reworked the Pet Library layout with a cleaner, simpler desktop style.
- Pet Library items can now attach directly to the screen without opening the preview modal.
- Imported pets now appear in the Pet Library instead of only appearing in history.
- Gallery folders are copied into the desktop build automatically.
- The build script now generates the gallery manifest from pet folders.

### Downloads

- Windows 64-bit: use the `x64` setup or MSI file.
- Windows 32-bit: use the `x86` setup or MSI file.
- macOS: use the DMG file.

### Notes

The macOS build may still require manual approval in Gatekeeper if it has not been notarized.
